name: Deepchecks
pricing_notes: OSS library free; Deepchecks Testing cloud: free tier; Pro $99/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: OSS: no auth; Cloud platform: API key from console

performance.notes: Check suites run locally; performance depends on dataset size; async cloud CI integration

agent_readiness.notes: ML testing library for validating models and data before/during deployment. Prebuilt check suites for tabular data, NLP, and computer vision. Checks: data integrity, train-test leakage, distribution shift, model performance. CI/CD integration. LLM evaluation checks in newer versions. Python library with pandas/sklearn integration.

gotchas: OSS version has fewer checks than cloud; some advanced checks require Pro
LLM evaluation support is newer and less complete than tabular ML
Reporting HTML outputs are bulky for automated CI/CD
Requires labeled validation data to run most checks effectively
best_when: ML teams wanting automated pre-deployment model validation
CI/CD pipelines for ML models needing data quality gates
Detecting data drift between train and test sets before training
Tabular ML classification/regression validation with rich check library
avoid_when: Real-time model monitoring in production (use Evidently/NannyML instead)
LLM-first teams (check library still immature for LLM use cases)
Teams without pandas/sklearn ecosystem (library assumes scikit-learn)
summary: Deepchecks is an ML testing library with prebuilt check suites for validating data and models before deployment. Covers data integrity, train-test leakage, distribution shift, and model performance for tabular, NLP, and CV tasks. Python/sklearn integration. CI/CD friendly. Best for data scientists wanting comprehensive pre-deployment validation checks without writing custom validators.
